{{Quote|I have no regrets over the death of Farvakine. My treatment at the hand of that foul water-seller gave me no choice. He didn't suffer, however much he deserved to.|[[Sissalik]] on Farvakine's death|<ref name="Ando: Planet of the Walrus Men">{{Wizards|url=default.asp?x=starwars/article/sw20030703ando|text=Ando: Planet of the Walrus Men|int=Ando: Planet of the Walrus Men}}</ref>}}
'''Farvakine''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Imperial officer/Legends|Imperial officer]] and [[Water/Legends|water]] [[Merchant/Legends|merchant]] on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] of [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]]. At some point, Farvakine bought the [[Mon Calamari/Legends|Mon Calamari]] [[Slavery/Legends|slave]] [[Sissalik]], and treated him cruelly. Sissalik later [[Death/Legends|killed]] him by [[Poison/Legends|poisoning]] his food with [[Chuba poison]], which triggered a deadly stroke.
